reasoning: A smart parking, QR scanning, and incident management app requires high utility, authority, and rapid clarity. The Swiss archetype provides a structured, highly functional aesthetic that makes critical actions (scanning, reporting, VoIP, alerts) stand out through sharp contrasts, removing unnecessary decorative noise. 95% of the UI should be monochrome, using color purely as function.

layout_spacing.grid_strategy_marketing: Bento Grid (Mode A) - asymmetrical, gap-8 to gap-12. Avoid perfect symmetry.
layout_spacing.grid_strategy_dashboard: Control Room Grid (Mode B) - strict hierarchy, gap-4 to gap-6. Dense, every pixel utilized. High correlation, scannability.
layout_spacing.surface_style: Grid Borders (Technical look) with 1px border and 0 shadow for standard structural cards. Neumorphism twist (1px border + soft shadow) only for active floating items.
layout_spacing.radius: rounded-none or max rounded-md (8px) for a sharper, structured, functional look

components.buttons: Sharp corners or subtle rounded-md. High contrast. Hover states MUST have text color explicitly set (e.g., hover:bg-black hover:text-white).
components.forms: Use Shadcn customized. Input fields should have a crisp 1px border. Focus states must clearly increase contrast: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-2.
components.navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (or bg-white/90), border-b border-black/5. Must not be transparent.
components.tables_data: Dense padding, left-aligned text. Clear grid lines or stripped backgrounds.
components.notifications: Sonner toast with sharp borders and distinct alert (Red), success (Green), warning (Yellow) colors. Real-time dropdown should be strictly functional without fluff.
components.icons: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Regular for a polished technical feel).

image_urls.description: Person holding phone near car, ideal for Landing Page Hero section showing QR scanning in action.
Businessman texting near a parked car. Use for the VoIP calling or Incident Notification features section.
Modern sports car parked in an urban garage. Use for the Vehicle Management or Admin Dashboard visual block.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Use text-shadow over any imagery.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based). For example: data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='scan-qr-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or 'Open Sans' for headings. Install and use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Follow Archetype 4 rules: 95% of the UI should be monochrome (white, gray, black). Use the primary color (#0033FF) and alert colors ONLY to guide action.
Ensure the dashboard uses a dense, 'Control Room' grid layout. Do not overuse generic Shadcn cards with thick shadows; stick to sharp 1px borders.
Implement the landing page hero overlay with a maximum of bg-white/40 (glassmorphism approach). Never use fully transparent headers.
Install @phosphor-icons/react for all iconography to maintain a high-end technical feel.
For the E-commerce QR sticker product listing, use a crisp CSS-styled mock element or placeholder geometric art, as the AI image generator hit rate limits.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all buttons, links, inputs, and major interactive nodes for testing.
